package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for where_clause_templates_duplicated_across_repositories: Repeated filter templates that should be shared through scopes or query builders.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule220NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule220NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule220NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario220Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule220NegativeService, input Rule220NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
